caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features a repeated logo with five stars and the word "HUSTLE." Above him, a red and blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "TALK 101." On the table, a black mug is visible with red text that reads "BOSS TALK 101." Across the frames, the man remains seated and speaks, with his facial expressions and slight head movements shifting as he talks. A small black logo is located in the bottom left corner of each frame. The setting and objects remain static while the man's speaking gestures provide the only movement.
